description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square base and a tall, conical body. The cone features two broad, white reflective stripes encircling its upper section, enhancing its visibility in low-light conditions. The surface appears smooth with a slightly matte finish, and the orange color is vivid and uniform throughout. The base is flat and robust, designed to provide stability and prevent tipping, and is slightly thicker than the cone itself. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no visible attachments or openings. There are no logos, text, or additional markings present, and the cone appears to be in new, clean condition with no visible wear or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes, a wide square base, and a smooth, clean surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, both white reflective stripes, and the square base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying both reflective stripes and the sturdy base, with minimal shadow variation.
description_view_2: Another angled view, highlighting the smooth surface and the even distribution of the orange color and stripes.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, with both reflective stripes and the base clearly visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper half of the cone, evenly spaced and of equal width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and slightly thicker than the cone, made of sturdy plastic for stability, with a smooth surface and no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
